line_item_fields.name: Job Name (or "Lamex PO" on some receipts)

validation_rules: If totals exist: total ~= subtotal + tax
If line items exist: total ~= sum(line_items.amount)
instructions:
Extraction Template Instructions:

Vendor:  
Anchor on prominent top text (uppercase, large font, e.g., "LOWE'S", "Home Depot"), or near store/brand logos. Use the first recognizable vendor name as string.

Invoice/Receipt Number:  
Anchor on label variants like “INVOICE”, “RECEIPT #”, “INV #”, or “TRANS#”. Capture nearby numeric value (ignore non-numerics). If multiple, pick the clear identifier near subtotal/total section. Normalize to integer.

Transaction/Invoice Date:  
Anchor on labels: “DATE”, “INVOICE DATE”, or date patterns (MM/DD/YY, MM-DD-YY, YYYY-MM-DD) near header or totals area. Normalize to ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD).

Invoice/Receipt Subtotal:  
Anchor on “SUBTOTAL:” or similar (“AMOUNT BEFORE TAX”, “SUB-TOTAL”). Capture adjacent numeric value. Remove commas/currency symbols.

Tax:  
Anchor on “TAX:”, “SALES TAX:”, or variants. Capture adjacent numeric value. Remove commas/currency symbols.

Invoice/Receive Total:  
Anchor on “TOTAL:”, “AMOUNT:”, “AMOUNT DUE:”, "GRAND TOTAL", or similar. Capture numeric value closest to "TOTAL" at document bottom/summary, not line item. Remove symbols.

Service Location, Shipping Address, Billing Address:  
Anchor on respective phrases (“SERVICE LOCATION”, “SHIP TO”, “SHIPPING ADDRESS”, “BILL TO”, “BILLING ADDRESS”). Extract the block of text following the label up to the next label or empty line. If not present, set as NaN.

Handwritten Note(s):  
Detect free-text (non-printed) handwriting, often slanted or with background shading, elsewhere on the page. If none detected, set as NaN.

Document Name:  
Extract from file name (provided as input or in footer/header). Example: “CDII_003314.pdf”.

Page Number:  
Extract page numbers from footer/header, or assume "1" if single page.

Bates Number:  
Extract from unique page/footer identifier or string matching known Bates pattern (e.g., "CDII_003314"); if not obvious, use file name minus extension.

Line Items Table Extraction:  
Detect line items by locating grouped repeating rows, often between transaction header and subtotal/total lines. 
- Item Description: Extract product/service name text in each row.
- Item Amount: Numeric amount in the same row, usually rightmost column. If missing, set as NaN.
- Job Name (or “Lamex PO”): Anchor on “Job Name” or “Lamex PO”. If such column exists, extract; otherwise set as NaN.

Normalization Rules:
- For amounts: Remove all commas and currency/symbols before converting to float.
- For dates: Convert all to YYYY-MM-DD.
- For text fields: Trim whitespace; set empty or missing as NaN.

General:  
Use nearest label/value pairing above, below, or beside anchor text as suits PDF layout. Prioritize explicit labels; if ambiguous, use positional context (e.g., summary tables, header sections). If not found, set field as NaN.
output_columns: Job Name (or "Lamex PO" on some receipts)
